what: Measured lift of the opt-in UniMorph paradigm backend (use_paradigms) on the offline NT lemma protocol.
protocol: no other backends active; greek.lemmatize per token via evaluate_on_nt scoring (the registry offline_nt_lemma protocol) with use_paradigms() toggled; asset grc-paradigms-v1 fetched sha-verified

results.regression_note: regressions are genuine lexical ambiguities (proper-noun vs common-noun capitalization, homographs), enumerated in the build report
